creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not in favour of passing maintainership to desktop@:
1) curl is too deep-level port for desktop@;
2) desktop@ is underpowered and has already plethora of ports to care about;
3) from my perspective Po-Chuan does good job maintaining the port: https://www.freshports.org/ftp/curl 

As for other proposals, the patch combines many changes, which make it hard to review. Could you please split style changes, update and switch to cmake?

I believe switching low-level ports like curl to cmake should be discussed more widely, and in case of agreement should be done separately from the update and perhaps after dedicated exp-run only.

Cheers,
Max
